title: JACKSON COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES - 211info
text: JACKSON COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES JACKSON COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a shelter for lost, stray, abandoned, or unwanted animals. Offers pet licensing, regulation compliance, and pet adoption. Accepts reports for animal bites. 5595 S Pacific Highway Phoenix, OR 97535 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Friday 11am-4pm, Saturday-Sunday noon-4pm Email (541) 774-6654 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 774-6654 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information. Appointments are required for most services. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Photo ID AREA SERVED: Jackson County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Entrance is off Highway 99, approximately 1 mile north of Talent. Turn right (if coming from Talent) and drive through the gate, then turn left and go straight to the visitor’s parking area. Services: Animal Adoption Animal Control Animal Licenses Animal Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JACKSON COUNTY ANIMAL SERVICES
